// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageItemGet references /item/{id}/
func POSTPageItemGet(id uint64) string {
	s_id := strconv.FormatUint(id, 10)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(len("@post('/item/") + len(s_id) + len("/')"))
	b.WriteString("@post('/item/")
	b.WriteString(s_id)
	b.WriteString("/')")
	return b.String()
}
